channel.title: Porsche 911 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in Porsche 911 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Lego Bugatti Chiron and Porsche 911 GT3 RS
item.description: Here you can see a photo comparison between Porsche 911 GT3 RS 🛒#ad and Bugatti Chiron 🛒#ad. Both models have nice details, include a suitcase under the hood, sequential shift, 4x4 traction, etc. have a look at them! Enjoy! (and if you do, you can Buy Me a Coffee )
